category_sources: Official uutils diffutils site describes it as a Rust implementation and drop-in replacement for GNU diffutils.
source_facts.description says uutils-diffutils is a cross-platform Rust rewrite of GNU diffutils.
display_name_sources: Official uutils site and GitHub repository use uutils diffutils/diffutils naming.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official uutils diffutils project page and links to documentation and repository resources.
source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository with README usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official uutils diffutils page lists diff, cmp, diff3, and sdiff compatibility goals.
source_facts.description identifies a cross-platform Rust rewrite of GNU diffutils.
